_comment: Skip-list for `zig build wasi-p3-testsuite` (scripts/wasi_p3_testsuite.py). This is the WASI Preview 3 *component decode* gate (#267 Phase 4): every real-world wasm32-wasip3 component from the upstream WASI testsuite must be decoded by wabt's component loader (`wabt component objdump`). (Contrast tests/p3-conformance-skip.json, which checks that wabt-PRODUCED single-built-in fixtures *encode* acceptably via `wasmtime compile`.) Keys are `<suite-name>` -> { `<fixture-stem>`: rationale }. Each rationale MUST end in a tracking issue (e.g. '... (#NNN)'). The suite name matches `tests/wasi-testsuite/tests/rust/testsuite/wasm32-wasip3/manifest.json` `name` ("WASI Rust tests [wasm32-wasip3]"). Empty = every fixture decodes. Mirrors wamr's tests/wasi-p3-testsuite-skip.json convention.
